The question is asking to determine how many games between the Eagles and Giants went into overtime. Since each row represents a game result and the "result" column indicates whether the game went into overtime (denoted by "(ot)"), we need to examine the "result" column for games involving these two teams. We can use the f_group_column(result) operation to group the games based on their result to analyze this situation.

The first game between the New York Giants and the Philadelphia Eagles went into overtime, as indicated by the "(ot)" in the result. The second game also went into overtime with "(ot)" appearing in the result. Therefore, there were 2 games that went into overtime between the Eagles and Giants.
